positive: A vibrant, symmetrical celestial garden composition featuring stylized elements of lunar phases, interconnected geometric floral motifs, and glowing nebulae dust. The style is a highly detailed, clean linework illustration combined with flat, bold vector colors, reminiscent of mid-century modern botanical prints. The composition must be centered, featuring a primary focal point of a glowing crescent moon nestled within intertwining stylized branches of abstract foliage. Use strong contrast between deep indigo, cosmic violet, emerald green, and gold leaf accents. The final image must have distinct silhouettes and solid, printable areas, perfectly suitable for repeating or placing on apparel. Minimalist background bleed, perfect symmetry, highly detailed illustration, ultra-clean, vector art.
